# Social Contract (Generated)

Contract: `SOCIAL-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `social`
Version: `2026-03-23`

Rules: 4

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-SOC-001 | must | friendship-graph-is-canonical | Friendship is the canonical admission graph for realm-level social relationships. |
| R-SOC-002 | must | ordered-pair-uniqueness | Friendship uses an ordered pair uniqueness model so the same pair cannot produce duplicate canonical rows. |
| R-SOC-003 | must | social-defines-admission-not-execution | Social defines relationship and admission facts and does not define agent-chat runtime, model routing, or turn execution. |
| R-SOC-004 | must | social-gates-human-chat-agent-chat-stays-outside | Social may gate human chat via preconditions, but canonical chat surface lives in Realm Chat and agent chat runtime stays outside Realm. |

Entities: 2

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Friendship | Friendship | id, accountIdL, accountIdH, kind, status |  |
| SocialPrecondition | Friendship | kind, status |  |

Required operations: 6
- GET /api/human/accounts/{id}/friends
- POST /api/human/accounts/{id}/friends
- DELETE /api/human/accounts/{id}/friends
- GET /api/human/me/friends
- GET /api/human/me/friends/list
- GET /api/human/me/friends/pending

Secondary operations: 2
- GET /api/human/accounts/{id}/mutual-friends
- GET /api/human/accounts/{id}/mutual-friends/count
